posts.author: sidh_11 (Siddharth)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,
I hope you are well,
I have and issue with Make and Monday Integration where I am unable to identify the root cause,
as when i run the make scenario i am getting an error like below,
[200] invalid value, please check our API documentation for the correct data structure for this column. Guide to Changing Column Values [ Error Code: ColumnValueException / Error Details: {“column_value”:“{"index"=>105}”,“column_type”:“StatusColumn”} ]

now i have changed the label on the monday board but this is still an error on monday board
can anyone help me with this to understand what is the issue or where i can look into to resolve this,
i am fairly new user on Monday and make,
Regards,
Sid.
